title: leucanthemopsis pulverulenta
intro: Leucanthemopsis pulverulenta, also known as alpine daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, particularly saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Leucanthemopsis pulverulenta include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help alleviate conditions such as digestive issues and skin problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves and flowers, which can be infused as a tea or used in tinctures and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
